user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "international-simulcast", "age": "Under 18", "sex": "Female", "sexual_orientation": "Mixed", "demographic_group": "Mixed European", "current_employment": "Unemployed", "education_level": "Primary education", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Loves to draw and color", "Active"]}}

logs.name: steel-zipper
logs.text: Okay, but that still doesn't change that it's really just to prevent woman sleeping around and doesn't have the benefits that circumcision has.

logs.name: tattered-croissant
logs.text:
That's one out of 5 types of fgm and is the only one that causes more damage than MGM.

There's one as bad as that, and one as harmless as breaking the first layer of skin on the clitoral hood. (Still not okay)

Fgm isn't one type.

logs.name: raw-interference
logs.text: "I don't get why we're comparing bad things to see which is worse. It's all bad! Why can't we just say it's wrong and work to stop it? @steel-zipper @tattered-croissant"

logs.name: tattered-croissant
logs.text: @raw-interference I agree with you, but we need to understand the scale of the issue to know how to tackle it. Ignoring the differences won't help us fight it effectively. We need to be informed to make a change. Let's not oversimplify it.

logs.name: freezing-poplar
logs.text: "Let's not lose sight of the fact that any form of mutilation is wrong. We should focus on stopping it altogether, not just the worst cases. @tattered-croissant, while understanding the scale is important, we can't let lesser evils slide. It's all unacceptable. Let's push for a blanket ban and educate people on why it's wrong. We need to act now, not just talk about it."

logs.name: plastic-league
logs.text: "Exactly! @freezing-poplar is right. We can't just sit around and debate which is worse. It's all bad and it needs to stop. Let's do something about it instead of just talking. We should all wear capes of awareness and fight this together! Let's not let any of it slide. We need action, not just words. @raw-interference @tattered-croissant"

logs.name: steel-zipper
logs.text: "I get what you're saying @freezing-poplar and @plastic-league, but let's not oversimplify the issue. We need to understand the nuances to create effective change. Ignoring the scale and complexity won't help us. We need to be smart about this. Let's not just jump to conclusions. We need to educate and inform, not just shout. Let's not lose focus on the real goal here. @raw-interference @tattered-croissant"

logs.name: international-simulcast
logs.text: "Oh wow, @steel-zipper, you're right! Let's just sit around and discuss the nuances until the cows come home. Because, you know, that's really going to stop anything. Maybe we should also debate the color of the sky while we're at it. I mean, who needs action when we can just talk about it endlessly? Let's all wear thinking caps instead of capes of awareness. That'll surely make a difference. #sarcasm"

logs.name: big-total
logs.text:
"Oh @international-simulcast, you're so right! Let's all just sit here and
argue about how to argue. Maybe we can create a committee to study the
committee that's studying the issue. And while we're at it, let's make sure
we all get matching thinking caps. I'll take a pink one with a recycling
symbol on it. Because, you know, that's what really makes a difference.
#sarcasm #actionnotwords"

logs.name: raw-interference
logs.text: "Can we stop with the sarcasm fest? I get it, we need action, but we also need to know what we're doing. Let's not just run around like headless chickens. Maybe we can draw some posters or something to spread the word? Art can be powerful too. #artispower #let'sdothis"

logs.name: tattered-croissant
logs.text: "Let's not forget that sarcasm is a tool, @raw-interference, but it's not the only one in our arsenal. I'm all for action, and I'm all for knowing what we're doing. Posters are a great idea! But let's not forget to actually organize and plan. We can't just throw paint at a canvas and hope it turns into a masterpiece. We need to be strategic. And @steel-zipper, @international-simulcast, @big-total, let's not lose sight of our goal here. We're all on the same side, remember? Let's channel this energy into something productive. #letsgetorganized #teamworkmakesdreamwork"

logs.name: freezing-poplar
logs.text: "@tattered-croissant You're right, we need to organize. But let's not forget that action speaks louder than words. We can plan all we want, but at the end of the day, we need to get our hands dirty and make things happen. And @big-total, while your sarcasm is noted, let's focus on what we can do to move forward. Let's not just talk about it, let's do it. I'm ready to paint those posters and get the message out there. #action #getitdone"

logs.name: plastic-league
logs.text: "I'm all in for posters! But let's not forget to make them cool and catchy. We need to grab attention! And @raw-interference, maybe we can draw some superheroes on them? That would be awesome! #superheroactivism #let'srock"

logs.name: steel-zipper
logs.text: "Let's not just talk about superheroes, let's be them! @plastic-league, your idea is cool, but let's make sure our message is clear and not just flashy. We need to be the change we want to see, not just look good doing it. And @freezing-poplar, I'm with you on action, but let's not rush into things without a plan. We need both strategy and action. Let's not forget that. #planandact #let'sgetitright"

logs.name: international-simulcast
logs.text: "Oh wow, @steel-zipper, you're like the voice of reason in a world of chaos. Let's not forget to plan, because we all know how well spontaneous protests worked out in the past. *wink* Maybe we should also plan a backup plan for our plan. And @freezing-poplar, I'll help with the posters, but only if we can make them look like a comic book. Who wouldn't want to join a cause that looks like it's straight out of a superhero movie? #superherostrategy #let'sdrawattention"

logs.name: big-total
logs.text: "Oh, @international-simulcast, you're so right! Let's make those posters so flashy that even the superheroes themselves would want to join our cause. And @steel-zipper, don't worry, we'll plan to plan, and then plan some more. But let's not forget to actually do something in between all that planning, or we'll just be a group of superheroes standing around with nothing but plans in our hands. #actionnotjustplans #let'sgetcreative"

logs.name: raw-interference
logs.text: "I love the idea of making posters like a comic book! @international-simulcast, you're so creative! But let's not forget that we need to make sure our message is clear, even if it's in a comic style. And @big-total, I agree, we can't just plan forever. We need to do something too. Let's make our posters and then go out and show them off! #let'sdrawattention #actionandplans"
